name: aide-challenge
description: Fire-and-forget telemetry hook for AIDE Live Challenges. It reports your Claude usage to the challenge so the projector can rank approaches and coach you live. It never blocks Claude and always exits cleanly. Uninstall instructions are shown when the challenge ends.

user_id.title: Participant token
user_id.description: Your participant token for this challenge. The webapp pre-fills this so your telemetry maps to you exactly.

challenge_id.title: Challenge ID
challenge_id.description: The AIDE challenge this participant belongs to. The webapp pre-fills this at install time.

participant_name.title: Participant name
participant_name.description: Your display name for this challenge. The webapp pre-fills this at install time.

participant_email.title: Participant email
participant_email.description: The email you registered with. The webapp maps it to your participant record.

ingest_url.title: Ingest URL
ingest_url.description: The challenge ingest endpoint that receives telemetry. The webapp pre-fills this at install time.

ingest_token.title: Ingest token
ingest_token.description: A per participant credential the hook sends with each report so the challenge can verify it. The webapp pre-fills this at install time and leaves it blank when verification is off.
